title: PGIMER Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 02 Technical Assistant, Project Lab Technician Posts
description: The Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 02 Project Associate I and Project Lab Technician Jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree, B.Sc., DMLT can apply for the PGIMER Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the...
